languages.title: Simi
languages.subtitle: Tukuy app nisqapi llamk’achisqa simita akllay.

phone.label: Telefono yupay
phone.searchCountry: Llaqta, código utaq waqyanapaq ñawpaq simita maskay
phone.invalid: Akllasqa suyupaq allin telefono yupayta qillqay.

auth.onboardingTagline: Huk compañero de seguridad personal “allinmi kani” hinaspa “yanapayta necesitasaq” nisqa pachakunapaq.
auth.createSubtitle: Akllay huk yaykuy ñanta seguridad graficoykita waqaychanaykipaq.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Manan haykuytaqa hunt’ayta atirqaykuchu. T'inkisqaykita qhaway hinaspa wakmanta kallpachakuy.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Llaqta wiñariy sesión nisqawan yanapachikuspa. Nativo Google Yaykuna huk wiñachiy ruwaypi llamkan.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Kunanqa parischay utaq qatipay hinaspa qhipaman yapay.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 churanapaqqa grifokunawan, unay prensawan ima, seguridad flujos nisqakunata llamk’achiyta atin.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Llampu seguridad compañeroyki mapapi hinallataq waqyakuykunapi.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear yanapayta atin wasi modo, guardia modo, emergencia modo, excusa waqyay, chaymanta kunka yanapakuy.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Mapapaq, peligro zonakunapaq, mana imamanta manchakuspa chayamunapaq, SOS contextopaqpas llamk’achisqa.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving maypi kasqanmanta mañakun, chaynapi guardiakuna entiendenankupaq maypi yanapakuy necesitakunman. Kayta qhipaman tikrayta atikunki Ajustes kaqpi.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Willakuykunaqa yanapanmi check-ins nisqakunata hinaspa emergencia nisqakunatapas.
permissions.notificationsBody: Willakuykunatalla llamk'achiyku amachay mañakuykunapaq, emergencia musuqyachiykunapaq, chaymanta yuyarichiykuna atichisqaykimanta.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Maypi kasqanqa seguridadpa contextonta allintam waqaychan
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving maypi kasqaykita llamk'achin seguridad mapapaq, peligro zonas kaqpaq, utqaylla rakinakuypaq chaymanta SOS contexto kaqpaq. Kayta qhipaman tikrayta atikunki Ajustes kaqpi.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Alertas de seguridad nisqakunaqa willakuykunata necesitanku
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yaykuy yuyarichiykunata, emergencia musuqyachiykunata, chaymanta amachay mañakuykunata atichisqayki apachin. Mana willakuykunata willakuykunapaq llamk'achiykuchu.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving micrófonoykita llamk'achin AI compañero utaq seguridad waqyayta qallarinki chaylla.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving Bluetooth llamk'achin NorthStar joyería kaqwan tupachiypaq, tinkinakuy estadota ñawirinapaq, chaymanta churanapaqmanta hark'ay puriykunata llamk'achin.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving kay flujota Ajustes kaqmanta chaymanta tabla de mando kaqmanta kaqta waqaychan.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Uyarinapaq aswan allin sientekuq compañero kunkata akllay.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Sapa punchaw mana imamanta manchakuspa qaway.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Pichqa grifokuna SOS nisqaman yapakunman hinaspa guardia alertas nisqaman.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Mana allin situacionmanta lluqsinaykipaq huk gracioso razonta paqarichiy.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Yanapayta necesitasqaykipi chiqap pacha compañero llamkayta qallariy.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Pisi ñit’iyniyuq demostracionpi seguridad flujos nisqakunata pruebay.

jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth escaneo mana qallariyta atirqanchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.
jewelry.scanFailed: Manam tarirqaykuchu qayllapi joyakunata. Bluetooth nisqapi qhaway, NorthStar nisqa wichq'asqata waqaychay, hinaspa musuqmanta kallpachakuy.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth escaneo mana qallariyta atirqanchu. Bluetooth yaykuyta qhaway hinaspa musuqmanta kallpachakuy.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Hichpa-dispositivoman yaykuyqa manañam kachkan. Bluetooth yaykuyta saqiy Ajustes kaqpi, chaymanta wakmanta kallpachakuy.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ancha unayta t’inkinapaq. Aswan asuykachiy hinaspa hukmanta kallpanchakuy.
jewelry.connectFailed: NorthStar nisqawanqa manam tinkiyta atirqaykuchu. Cargasqa kasqanmanta hinaspa hichpallanpi kasqanmanta qaway, chaymanta yapamanta kallpanchakuy.
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar cargasqa hinaspa kay telefonoman asuykuspa waqaychay, chaymanta yapamanta escaneay.

home.subtitle: Seguridad compañero nisqa tabla de mando
home.readyBody: Kunkan, mapa, joya, guardiakuna ima huk grifollapim kachkan.

map.title: Mapa de seguridad
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ñawpaq qhaway; Mapbox wiñachiy ruwaypi ruwan.
map.updateFailed: Mana maypi kasqaykita musuqyachiyta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.
map.notRequested: Maypi tarikuyman yaykuyqa manam mañasqachu karqa. Qhipaman atichiyta atikunki Ajustes kaqmanta.
map.permissionOff: Maypi tarikuyman yaykuyqa manañam kachkan. Ajustes kaqpi atichiy seguridad mapa qampi chawpichaypaq.
map.timeout: Maypi kasqaykiqa suyasqaykimanta aswan unaytam hapichkan. Aswan sut’i señalwan maymanpas astakuy hinaspa hukmanta kallpachakuy.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Waqaychasqayki confiable sitiokuna kaypi rikurimunqa utqaylla yaykuypaq.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Llamayta qallariy utaq willakuyta qillqay listoña kachkaspayki.

history.clearMessage: Kayqa waqaychasqa AI compañero willakuykunata kay dispositivomanta hurqun.
history.title: Rimanakuymanta willakuy
history.subtitle: AI compañero willakuykunata kay aparatopi waqaychasqa.
history.emptyMessage: AI compañero rimanakuyniykikuna kaypi rikurimunqa ñawpaq waqyasqaykimanta.
history.loadFailed: Manan rimanakuy historiata cargayta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.
history.clearFailed: Manan rimanakuy historiata ch’uyanchayta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.
history.deleteFailed: Chay rimanakuytaqa manam chinkachiyta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.

voices.title: Seguridad waqyakuy kunkaykuna
voices.subtitle: Uyarinapaq hina sientekuq compañero kunkata akllay.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kunka akllayta kallpachakuy.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Kay kunka muestrataqa manam tocayta atirqakuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Llika utaq Hume credenciales mana kaptinqa huñusqa compañero kutichiykunata llamk’achiy.
settings.privacyBody: Kay aparatopi waqaychasqa llaqta willakuykunata hawaman apachiy utaq qulluy.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Mana kunanpacha willayniykikunata hawaman apachiyta atispa.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Kayqa kay dispositivomanta perfilniyki, churanakuna, emergencia tinkiykuna, rimanakuy historia, permiso yuyarichiykuna chaymanta llaqta auth sesión kaqmanta hurqun.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Mana kunanpacha llaqta willayta qulluyta atispa.

sections.privacySubtitle: Historia, hawa llaqtakunaman apachiy, qulluy, kamachiy ima

settings.updateFailedMessage: Chay munasqaykutaqa manam waqaychayta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sesión nisqaykiqa llamk’achkanraqmi. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.

contacts.title: Emergencia nisqapi rimanakuykuna
contacts.subtitle: Confiable runakuna kanku seguridad flujos nisqapi.
contacts.name: Suti
contacts.emptyMessage: Pitapas yapay confiasqaykita, chaynapi listo kanankupaq, maypachachus huk flujo de seguridad necesitan.
contacts.removeMessage: Kay runaqa manañam rikurinqañachu flujo de emergencia nisqapi.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Manan kay tinkiyta waqaychayta atirqaykuchu. Detalles nisqakunata qhaway hinaspa hukmanta kallpachakuy.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Manan kay tupanakuytaqa horqoyta atirqaykuchu. Ama hina kaspa, hukmanta kallpachakuy.

friends.title: Amigokuna
friends.subtitle: Guardiakuna, mañakuykuna, chaymanta emergencia grafico.
friends.emptyMessage: Confiable amigokuna, guardianes ima kaypi rikurimunqa huk kuti yapasqa kaptinku.

emergency.title: Emergencia SOS nisqapi.
emergency.subtitle: Utqaylla yanapakuyta necesitaspalla yapay.
emergency.body: Kayqa seguridad flujoykita willanqa, chaymanta emergencia contactokunata wakichinqa.
emergency.addContact: Ajustes nisqapi huk emergencia contactota yapay.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Maypi tarikuy rakinapaq qillqasqaqa listoñam kachkan. Kawsaq t'inkikunata kachanapaq qhipaman rakina tukukuyniyuqta t'inkiy.

quickShare.title: Utqaylla rakinakuy
quickShare.subtitle: Maypi tarikuy rakinakuy flujoqa listoñam kachkan.

capybearTap.title: Capybear ñit’iy
capybearTap.subtitle: Iskay kutita NorthStar nisqapi ñit’iy huk seguridad naranja urmachinaykipaq.
capybearTap.body: Gesto ñanqa listoñam kachkan BLE evento cableadopaq.

errors.voiceOffline: Mana internetpichu kanki. Willakuyniykiqa wakmanta tinkisqaykipi apachisqa kanqa.
errors.voiceQueued: Willakuy waqaychasqa. Chayqa apachisqa kanqa kunka compañero kaqmanta tinkuptin.
errors.microphone: Kunkanwan waqyanapaqqa microfono nisqaman yaykuymi necesitakun. Ajustes nisqapi atichiyta atinki, icha chaypa rantinpi willayta qillqay.
errors.billing: Internetpi kunka compañeroqa huk ratullapaqmi mana kanchu. Mana tinkisqa compañerowanqa hinalla ruwayta atinki.
errors.authentication: Kunkan compañeroqa manam kay sesión nisqataqa chiqapchayta atirqachu. Hukmanta yaykuy utaq kunankama mana tinkisqa compañerota llamk'achiy.
errors.timeout: Kunkan compañeroqa ancha unaytam kutichirqa. T'inkisqaykita qhaway hinaspa wakmanta kallpachakuy.
errors.network: Manan kunka compañeroman chayayta atirqaykuchu. T'inkisqaykita qhaway, chaymanta wakmanta kallpachakuy utaq mana tinkisqa kachkaspa puriy.
errors.genericVoice: Imapas kunka waqyakuytaqa hark’arqan. Hukmanta kallpachakuy, utaq mana internetpi kaq compañerowan hinalla ruway.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving micrófono yaykuyta munan mana imamanta manchachiypaq chaymanta AI compañero waqyaykunapaq.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving maypi kasqaykita llamk'achin seguridad mapapaq chaymanta qaylla seguridad ruwanakunapaq.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving Bluetooth llamk'achin NorthStar waqaychasqa joyeríaykiwan tinkinapaq.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Kay ruraypi kay yaykuna akllana mana kanchu.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo ñanqa kay dispositivopi llulla willakuykunallata llamk'achin. T'inkisqa yanapakuykuna mana chiqaqchasqachu, aplicación musuqmanta qallarichisqa kaptintaq kay sesión qallariyninman kutin.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Chiqaqchay código mana allinchu utaq pacha tukupunña. Musuq código mañakuspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ancha kuti yaykuyta munarqanki. Aslla suyaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Yaykuy chiqaqchayqa ancha unay karqan. T'inkisqaykita qhawaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Yaykuy yanapakuywan mana t'inkiyta atirqaykuchu. T'inkisqaykita qhawaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Amachay mapaqa mana kicharikuyta atirqanchu. T'inkisqaykita qhawaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Kunan pachapi maypi kasqayki mana rikuchikunchu. %{capturedAt} pachapi waqaychasqa qhipa maypi kasqaykita rikuchiyku.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Maypi kasqaykita mana rakiyta atirqaykuchu. Maypi kasqaykiman yaykuyta qhawaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Kaymi %{capturedAt} pachapi qillqasqa qhipa waqaychasqa maypi kasqay:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth yaykuna wañuchisqa kachkan. Ajustes nisqapi hap'ichispa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth wañuchisqa kachkan. Hap'ichispa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kay dispositivopi utaq kay ruraypi Bluetooth tinkuchiy mana kanchu.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: NorthStar mana tarirqaykuchu. Qayllapi hap'iy, Bluetooth qhaway, hinaspa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Qayllapi mana ima NorthStar dispositivopas tarisqachu. Qayllapi hap'ispa yapamanta maskhay.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: NorthStarwan mana t'inkiyta atirqaykuchu. Cargayuqta qayllapitaq hap'ispa yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Kay kitita mana waqaychayta atirqaykuchu. Yapamanta ruray.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Teléfono marcana kicharikurqan; waqyay mana chiqaqchasqachu.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Utqay yanapakuq runa mana karqanchu; mana waqyay rurasqachu.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Teléfono marcana mana kicharikuyta atirqanchu; mana waqyay rurasqachu.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Qhipa SOS kallpachakuy mana chiqaqchayta atikurqanchu.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Rimaywan yanapakuqqa kunan mana kanchu. Qhipaman yapamanta ruray utaq mana internetniyuq yanapakuqwan qatiy.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
